name: lobster-tank
description: OpenClaw management dashboard — audit, monitor, and manage AI agent deployments

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/server && npm run typecheck -w packages/client
